sections.paragraph:
Jeroham H3395
1. A Levite, and grandfather of Samuel
1Sa 1:1; 1Ch 6:27; 1Ch 6:34
2. A chief of the tribe of Benjamin
1Ch 8:27
3. A descendant of Benjamin
1Ch 9:8
4. A priest, and father of Adaiah, who dwelt in Jerusalem after the exile
1Ch 9:12; Neh 11:12
5. Father of two Israelites who joined David at Ziklag
1Ch 12:7
6. Father of Azareel
1Ch 27:22
7. Father of Azariah
2Ch 23:1
